use_cases: Display QR code for mobile users to scan and access shared content or links
Enable quick sharing of URLs or digital content via QR code generation
Provide a scannable card interface for sharing contact information or payment details
Facilitate seamless handoff from desktop to mobile devices through QR code scanning
Serve as a social sharing mechanism for profiles, portfolios, or product pages
ai_summary: A card-based UI component designed to display and share content via QR code, enabling seamless handoff between desktop and mobile devices. Built with standard web technologies and Tailwind CSS, featuring a minimalist visual style with standard hover interactions. Typically used for sharing links, profiles, or digital content in SaaS, e-commerce, and fintech applications.
